tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: Most parameters are within normal limits. Notable findings include mildly elevated LDL cholesterol and low HDL cholesterol, indicating increased cardiovascular risk. Chloride is slightly above the upper limit but likely not clinically significant in isolation. Glucose control is good (HbA1c and fasting glucose normal), and renal function is preserved. Recommend addressing dyslipidemia and monitoring cardiovascular risk factors.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
